g.text: Plant parameters shape the dynamics before control is added

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #52606d

g.text: The same input can produce very different transient responses and pole locations.

path.style: fill: #f3f6f9; stroke: #cbd2d9; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linejoin: miter

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #1f2937

g.text: Higher stiffness and damping move the poles farther left, producing a faster and less oscillatory response.
